name: Initial Opening Balance
description: Establishes the Store’s initial recorded quantity and valuation when beginning inventory tracking in ShelfStack.

name: Migration Import
description: Records inventory quantity and cost imported from a prior system, spreadsheet, or other historical source.

name: Previously Unrecorded Stock
description: Adds merchandise that was already physically present but had not previously been recorded in inventory.

name: Demonstration or Setup Stock
description: Establishes initial inventory used for demonstrations, testing, training, store setup, or similar non-receipt activity.

name: Other
description: Establishes opening inventory for a reason not covered by the standard opening-inventory reasons.

name: Physical Count Overage
description: Increases recorded quantity because a physical count found more units than the current system balance.

name: Physical Count Shortage
description: Decreases recorded quantity because a physical count found fewer units than the current system balance.

name: Found Stock
description: Adds units that were located after previously being missing, misplaced, or excluded from the recorded balance.

name: Loss or Theft
description: Removes units believed to have been lost, stolen, or otherwise no longer physically present.

name: Discard
description: Removes units that were physically discarded, destroyed, or otherwise permanently removed from inventory.

name: Data Correction
description: Corrects an identified quantity-entry or system-data error without representing a physical receipt or sale.

name: Other
description: Changes inventory quantity for a reason not covered by the standard quantity-adjustment reasons.

name: Replace Estimate with Actual
description: Replaces a previously estimated inventory valuation with documented actual acquisition cost.

name: Documented Cost Correction
description: Corrects inventory valuation using authoritative documentation such as an invoice, cost statement, or verified source record.

name: Migration Correction
description: Corrects inventory valuation that was imported incorrectly or incompletely during data migration.

name: Valuation Error
description: Corrects an inventory value caused by an identified calculation, entry, configuration, or posting error.

name: Other
description: Corrects inventory valuation for a reason not covered by the standard cost-correction reasons.
